title: angelica kingii
intro: Angelica kingii, also known as Dong quai, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica kingii include reducing menstrual cramps, improving menopausal symptoms, and supporting liver and kidney function, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Angelica kingii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
